affirmation: Thank you for always bringing the laughter in our lives!
You're doing amazing! Keep leaping forward and enjoy the lilypads along the way.
Drink some water (you need to) and get some sun, just like a sunflower. You are growing beautifully!
You stress too much :( Take a moment to get comfy and relax. You deserve it.
Your smile is perhaps the cutest I've ever seen, dearest! Let your light fill the room.
Just like you!
Good things take time. Be patient with yourself and trust your own timing to bloom.
Like a fresh cup of matcha, may your day be grounding, peaceful, and full of energy (& mangoes).
You deserve all the happiness the universe has to offer.
Only the cutest smile I've ever seen!
You never back down from standing up for what is right, even when it is hard. Your courage is truly beautiful!
You are the kind of friend who would ride or die for the people you love. I am so lucky to have you in my corner!
You try your absolute best to be kind to everyone, and that makes you the most beautiful person inside and out.
You hold so much privilege, yet you never let it get to your head. Your grounded nature is so admirable!
You are such a ladybug to everyone around you (and me especially!) Good things are coming your way!
You're always ready to help whoever needs it. You're kind, helpful, and simply beautiful.
Stay rooted like a plant, but let your leaves reach for new heights today!
You are so brave for speaking your mind and fighting for justice, even when you have to stand alone.
Just like a hot cup of tea, take some time to let things steep and relax.
Let's skip the affirmation today hehe.
Decades from now, we'll still be laughing, gossiping, playing games, and going on crazy adventures together.
You're the sweetest friend I never deserved.
You are a total force of nature! Watching you stand up for what's fair inspires me every single day.
There is absolute magic in how generous and helpful you are. You make the world a kinder, more beautiful place.
Literally all I do when I'm with you.
You stand up for fairness no matter who is on the other side. You are fierce, loyal, and incredibly beautiful.
Even on cloudy days, the sun is still there. Better times are just around the corner.
I trust you with everything because I know you would cross oceans for your friends. I'd do the exact same for you!
You are a gift to this world! Never forget how special and appreciated you are.
You are braver than you think, stronger than you seem, and loved more than you know.
